title: alnus jorullensis subsp. lutea
intro: Alnus jorullensis subsp. lutea, also known as the yellow green alder, is a subspecies of deciduous shrub or small tree native to Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be beneficial in treating various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Alnus jorullensis subsp. lutea include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. Alnus jorullensis subsp. lutea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
